description:
🕒 08:00–15:10

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ohk-hannoalps4/

We traverse the ridge of the Hanno Alps—which extends from Izugadake to Tenranzan—over four separate outings. Part 4 starts at Higashi-Agano Station and crosses Tengaku Mountain, Kusumizaka, and Nagadayama on the way to Takuomineyama, Tenranzan, and Hanno Station. Lunch will be a special bento box from Nikoniko House.

【Fee】
¥7,800 per person (includes guide service, lunch, and insurance)

【Capacity】
10 people

【Guide】
Akira Shimizu (certified mountain guide, Japan Alpine Guide Association, Stage II)

【What to bring】
Gloves, drinking water, hat, rain gear, snacks, towel
location: 集合 西武池袋線「東吾野駅」駅前広場
summary: Mountain guide tour: Hanno Alps full traverse Part 4 (Higashi-Agano Station to Tengaku Mountain, Takuomineyama, Tenranzan, ending at Hanno Station)
